Back to Projects
BlockOut

BlockOut

BlockOut brings a unique visual approach to task management by combining the intuitive treemap visualization of WinDirStat with powerful planning capabilities. See your time and tasks as a visual landscape, making it easy to understand your workload at a glance and plan your days, weeks, and months effectively.

Visit Live Site

BlockOut Interface Preview

Screenshot coming soon

Features

  • Treemap task visualization
  • Medium-term planning (weeks/months)
  • Daily scheduling integration
  • Time block allocation
  • Visual workload analysis
  • Drag-and-drop interface

Tech Stack

React
D3.js
TypeScript
Node.js
Redis

Tags

ProductivityVisualizationPlanningTreemap
